_meta.purpose: Per-Lambda overrides to make Seed + Pre-flight check work without source-code edits.

schema.fixture_keys: { <s3-object-key>: <'fixture://<file>' | absolute-path> } — Seed will upload these files to the Lambda's first detected S3 bucket under each given key.
schema.extra_buckets: [<bucket-name>] — additional S3 buckets to create that aren't auto-detected from serverless.yml.
schema.skip_seed: true → skip Seed step entirely (Lambda has no AWS deps).
schema.skip_preflight: true → skip Pre-flight (Lambda is pure compute, no I/O).
schema.external_apis_required: [<host>] — third-party hosts the Lambda will call. Pre-flight warns these will fail in Floci. Informational only.
schema.expected_failure_marker: <substring> — case-insensitive marker that must appear in log_tail/output to confirm Lambda reached the expected boundary. If hit, verdict = pass_with_caveat (PASS). If crash before marker, verdict = fail. If timeout without marker, verdict = inconclusive.
schema.expected_failure_stage: <short-label> — human-readable stage name shown in verdict banner (e.g. 'external_api', 'aws_unsupported', 'compute_complete').
schema.notes: Free-form text shown in pre-flight output.

beaconstac_pdf_compressor.notes: Reads s3://${S3_BUCKET}/${event.key} and writes ${event.key}-old. Ghostscript runs in-container — not present in Floci Lambda runtime.

beaconstac_image_optimizer.notes: Reads S3 image, resizes via Pillow, writes back.

beaconstac_svg_sanitizer.notes: Reads SVG, sanitizes via DOMPurify, writes back.

beaconstac_email_service.notes: SQS-triggered, sends via SES. Floci has SES emulator — emails go to fake mailbox.

polo_email_service.notes: Same as beaconstac_email_service but for Polo.

forms-response-sync-service.notes: Real Google sync NOT possible under Floci. Test verifies SQS parse + retry flow. For end-to-end, use staging.

beaconstac_qr_code_generator.notes: Pure generator — no S3 fixtures needed. Output written to S3 by handler.

beaconstac_bulk_qr_generator.notes: Kicks off an ECS task. Floci does not emulate ECS — invoke will fail at ECS RunTask call.

uniqode-print-qr-codes-pdf.notes: SQS-triggered, generates printable PDF, uploads to S3.

beaconstac_analytics.notes: Firehose record sanitiser — receives records inline via the test event, no S3/SQS deps.

beaconstac_request_logs.notes: Firehose record sanitiser — receives records inline.

beaconstac_analytics_data_stream_to_fire.notes: DDB stream → Firehose. Firehose put_record will fail under Floci.

beaconstac_analytics_validator.notes: Internal QA, DDB stream input only.

una_ai_chat_data_stream_to_firehose.notes: Same as analytics_data_stream_to_firehose but for AI chat.

beaconstac_search.notes: Kinesis stream → ES. ES write will fail.

cloudwatch_slack.notes: SNS-triggered. Will fail at Slack webhook POST.

beaconstac_intercom_rate_limiter.notes: Will fail at Intercom API call.

external_apis_required: Google Safe Browsing or similar threat feed
beaconstac_malware_detection.notes: Scheduled. Will fail at threat-feed API.

beaconstac_lead_scoring.notes: Handler is currently commented out in serverless.yml.

beaconstac_azure_integration_tunnel.notes: HTTP-triggered. Real Azure handshake won't work locally.

beaconstac_cloudfront_lambda@edge_handle.notes: Lambda@Edge — special runtime constraints; basic boot test only.

beaconstac_custom_domain_ssl_handler.notes: Will fail at ACM cert request.

beaconstac_events_sender.notes: Will fail at customer webhook POST. Use webhook.site for staging.

beaconstac_webhook_service.notes: Same as events_sender — customer URL HTTPS calls.

beaconstac_ip_bot_scans_report.notes: Scheduled report. Reads DDB, sends email/Slack.

beaconstac_profile_picture.notes: Scheduled. Generates avatar PNG, uploads to S3.

beaconstac_scan_details.notes: SQS-triggered. Generates Excel from DDB data.

external_apis_required: MaxMind or similar IP-to-geo (may be local)

cloudfront_analytics_dlq.notes: Reprocesses failed CloudFront events. SQS DLQ consumer.

webpage-parser-service.notes: Scrapes HTTP — will fail without real network in Floci.

external_apis_required: AI image generation API (Replicate or similar)
gen-ai-qr-codes.notes: Empty dir at the moment — no serverless.yml.
